scripts.build: pnpm build:shared && pnpm build:electron && pnpm build:web
scripts.dist:win:builder: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @temu-lister/electron exec electron-builder --win portable --x64
scripts.dist:mac: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @temu-lister/electron exec electron-builder --mac dmg zip --x64 --arm64
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter shared exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @temu-lister/electron exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter web exec tsc --noEmit
